DTEval 0.1.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    R code for Diffusion Tube Data Evaluation.

    DTEval is a package of R code used for the pro-processing, analysis and evaluation of diffusion tube (DT) data typically collected in air quality assessment exercises.

    Project Webpages

    DTEval Projects pages: draft release

    Installation

    Get developer’s version of DTEval from GitHub (archive):

    # (if you do not have remotes package, install it from CRAN) 
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("karlropkins/DTEval")

    If you have the DTEval .tar.gz file:

    # install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_local(file.choose()) # and select

    Background

    This package contains code developed as part of an on-going project, and is currently open for beta-testing.

    Contributing

    Contributions are very welcome.

    License

    GPL-3
